title: Korak 62

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
import re
import secrets
import string


def generate_password(length, nums, special_chars, uppercase, lowercase):
    # Define the possible characters for the password
    letters = string.ascii_letters
    digits = string.digits
    symbols = string.punctuation

    # Combine all characters
    all_characters = letters + digits + symbols

    while True:
        password = ''
        # Generate password
        for _ in range(length):
            password += secrets.choice(all_characters)
       
        constraints = [
            (nums, r'\d'),
            (lowercase, r'[a-z]'),
            (uppercase, r'[A-Z]'),            
            (special_chars, fr'[{symbols}]')            
        ]

        # Check constraints
        count = 0
        if all([]):
            break
    
    return password

import re
import secrets
import string


def generate_password(length, nums, special_chars, uppercase, lowercase):
    # Define the possible characters for the password
    letters = string.ascii_letters
    digits = string.digits
    symbols = string.punctuation

    # Combine all characters
    all_characters = letters + digits + symbols

    while True:
        password = ''
        # Generate password
        for _ in range(length):
            password += secrets.choice(all_characters)
       
        constraints = [
            (nums, r'\d'),
            (lowercase, r'[a-z]'),
            (uppercase, r'[A-Z]'),            
            (special_chars, fr'[{symbols}]')            
        ]

        # Check constraints
        count = 0
        if all([]):
            break
    
    return password

tests.text: Trebalo bi da prođeš [constraint <= len(re.findall(pattern, password)) for constraint, pattern in constraints] kroz funkciju all().
tests.testString:
({ test: () => assert(runPython(`
  _Node(_code).find_function("generate_password").find_while("True").find_bodies()[0].find_ifs()[0].find_conditions()[0].is_equivalent("all([constraint <= len(re.findall(pattern, password)) for constraint, pattern in constraints])")
`)) })

description:
Trenutno, all() uzima prazan niz kao argument. Popunite taj prazan niz korišćenjem sintakse komprehenzije kako bi niz sačuvao rezultate evaluacije matematičkog izraza constraint <= len(re.findall(pattern, password)) za svaku tuple od constraint-pattern u nizu constraints.

Na ovaj način, napuštate ciklus while samo nakon što su svi zahtjevi ispunjeni.
